Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface ITypeEnvironment.IIterator

Enclosing interface:
ITypeEnvironment
public static interface ITypeEnvironment.IIterator
Protocol for iterating over a type environment.

Typical use for this iterator looks like: 

    Iterator iterator = typeEnvironment.getIterator();
    while (iterator.hasNext()) {
        iterator.advance();
        String name = iterator.getName();
        Type type = iterator.getType();
        ...
    }

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    advance()
    Advance to the next mapping in the iterated type environment.
    FreeIdentifier
    asFreeIdentifier()
    Returns a typed free identifier corresponding to the current mapping.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of the current mapping (that is its left-hand side).
    Type
    getType()
    Returns the type of the current mapping (that is its right-hand side).
    boolean
    hasNext()
    Tells whether the iterator has reached the last mapping of the iterated type environment.
    boolean
    isGivenSet()
    Returns whether the current mapping denotes a given set.

  • Method Details

    • hasNext

      boolean hasNext()
      Tells whether the iterator has reached the last mapping of the iterated type environment.
      Returns:
      true if there is another mapping to iterate over

    • advance

      void advance() throws NoSuchElementException
      Advance to the next mapping in the iterated type environment.
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the iterator has been exhausted

    • getName

      String getName() throws NoSuchElementException
      Returns the name of the current mapping (that is its left-hand side). The method advance() must have been called at least once since the creation of the iterator, before calling this method.
      Returns:
      the name of the current mapping
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if advance hasn't been called before

    • getType

      Type getType() throws NoSuchElementException
      Returns the type of the current mapping (that is its right-hand side). The method advance() must have been called at least once since the creation of the iterator, before calling this method.
      Returns:
      the type of the current mapping
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if advance hasn't been called before

    • isGivenSet

      boolean isGivenSet() throws NoSuchElementException
      Returns whether the current mapping denotes a given set. Given set are recognized by the fact that they associate a name S to the type ℙ(S).

      The method advance() must have been called at least once since the creation of the iterator, before calling this method.

      Returns:
      true iff the current mapping denotes a given set
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if advance hasn't been called before

    • asFreeIdentifier

      FreeIdentifier asFreeIdentifier() throws NoSuchElementException
      Returns a typed free identifier corresponding to the current mapping.

      The method advance() must have been called at least once since the creation of the iterator, before calling this method.

      Returns:
      a free identifier corresponding to the current mapping
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if advance hasn't been called before
      Since:
      3.1
